title: Carbonite Guild
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Carbonite Guild''' was a powerful [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]]-[[Mining/Legends|mining]] conglomerate that rose to prominence on [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]] between the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace]] and [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith Wars]]. By the time of the latter, it was associated with the [[Mining Guild/Legends|Mining Guild]] and shared rule of the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]] with the [[Tetan/Legends|Tetan]] royalty. It was lead by [[Chairman/Legends|Chairman]] [[Bearus]].

After [[Satal Keto/Legends|Satal]] and [[Aleema Keto]]'s [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] rose to power, the Guild's prominence was shattered.

==Behind the scenes==
Its relation to the [[Carbonite Miners' Union]] is unknown.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Dark Lords of the Sith'' 1]] {{1st}}
